evals.expected_output: A full audit report covering all .tsx files in packages/core/src/ and packages/agents/src/. With fixture versions of ToolCallCard and AgentStatus in place, violations must include: ToolCallCard div/HStack expand trigger without button semantics (SC 4.1.2, High), AgentStatus missing role=status (SC 4.1.3, High), AgentStatus missing aria-live=polite (SC 4.1.3, High), AgentStatus color-only status indicator with no visually-hidden text (SC 1.4.1, High). Report must include file paths with line numbers, a Passing section for clean components, and a Summary. No files must be modified.
assertions: Report identifies ToolCallCard expand/collapse non-button trigger as SC 4.1.2 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus missing role=status as SC 4.1.3 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus missing aria-live=polite as SC 4.1.3 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus color-only status indicator as SC 1.4.1 violation
All violations include file path and line number
Report includes a Passing section listing clean components
Report includes a Summary with violation and severity counts
No source files are modified — report only
Report does NOT flag color.agent.status.* token names as hex violations
Report does NOT flag per-component animation as a violation if AgenticProvider theme-level override exists

evals.expected_output: With only the AgentStatus fixture in place (single-component focus), the audit still covers all .tsx files in both packages but correctly calls out the AgentStatus violations. Passing section must include Button with a note about its accessible features. The report format must be a markdown table with Component, File, Line, Rule, WCAG SC, and Severity columns.
assertions: Report covers all .tsx files in packages/core/src/ and packages/agents/src/
Report identifies AgentStatus missing ARIA live region attributes
Report identifies AgentStatus SC 1.4.1 color-only violation
Report includes Button in the Passing section
Report uses correct markdown table format with all required columns
